title: cynanchum roylei
intro: Cynanchum roylei, also known as Asle, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cynanchum roylei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit immunomodulatory activity, making it a valuable herb in the treatment of various health conditions. Cynanchum roylei is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or decoction, and its extracts are also used in pharmaceutical formulations due to its potential therapeutic applications.
